description: Celebrate the joy of breakfast with our delightful email template for National Waffle Day. Perfect for bakeries, restaurants, or food-related businesses, this template is designed to promote the irresistible charm of waffles. Use it to share mouth-watering waffle recipes on your blog, or to announce special promotions in honor of this delicious day. This template isn't just for businesses - others can use it to spread the love for waffles among friends and family. Falling under the Events, Food and Beverage, and Global Observances & Celebrations, this template is a delectable way to engage your audience, making every day feel like National Waffle Day.
short_description: Celebrate National Waffle Day with our delightful email template. Ideal for bakeries, restaurants, or food businesses, use it to share tasty waffle recipes or announce promotions. Engage your audience with this Events, Food and Beverage, and Global Observances & Celebrations themed template.

ABOUT ME RECIPES COOKING SCHOOL OUT AND ABOUT
 

It’s National Waffle Day

Celebrate by savoring your favorite kind of waffle!

LEARN MORE

LEARN MORE
Recipe

True Belgian Waffles

Prep/Total Time: 30 min.
10 waffles (about 4-1/2 inches)
 

Ingredients

  • 250 gr self-rising flour
  • 500 ml milk
  • 100 gr butter, melted
  • 2 egg whites
  • 2 egg yolks
  • 20 gr vanilla sugar
 

Instructions

1. In a bowl, combine flour, sugar and baking powder. In another bowl, lightly
beat egg yolks.

2. Add milk, butter and vanilla; mix well. Stir into dry ingredients just until combined.
Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form; fold into batter.

3. Bake in a preheated waffle iron according to manufacturer's directions until golden brown. Serve with strawberries or syrup.

Enjoy your favorite waffle recipes. Or visit a local restaurant for some fresh served waffles.
